mapper.select: SELECT j.job_id AS jobId, j.fk_memberId AS memberId, j.fk_category_id AS categoryId, c.category_name AS categoryName, j.title AS title, j.work_type AS workType, j.career_type AS careerType, j.salary AS salary, j.deadline_at AS deadlineAt, j.status AS status, j.view_count AS viewCount, j.headcount AS headcount FROM tbl_job_posting j LEFT JOIN tbl_job_category c ON c.category_id = j.fk_category_id AND c.depth = 1 WHERE j.fk_memberid = #{memberId} AND j.status = '게시중' ORDER BY j.job_id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tbl_banner ( banner_id, fk_memberid, fk_job_id, title, start_at, end_at, status ) VALUES ( #{bannerId}, #{fkMemberId}, #{fkJobId}, #{title}, TO_DATE(#{startAt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), TO_DATE(#{endAt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), #{status} )

INSERT INTO tbl_image_file ( file_id, target_id, target_type, filecategory, file_url, created_at, original_filename ) VALUES ( #{fileId}, #{targetId}, #{targetType}, #{fileCategory}, #{fileUrl}, SYSDATE, #{originalFilename} )
mapper.select:
SELECT b.BANNER_ID AS bannerId, b.FK_MEMBERID AS fkMemberId, b.FK_JOB_ID AS fkJobId, b.TITLE AS title, b.IMAGE_FILE_ID AS imageFileId, TO_CHAR(b.START_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS startAt, TO_CHAR(b.END_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS endAt, b.STATUS AS status, b.REJECT_REASON AS rejectReason,
j.TITLE AS jobTitle, f.FILE_URL AS fileUrl, f.ORIGINAL_FILENAME AS originalFilename
FROM TBL_BANNER b LEFT JOIN TBL_JOB_POSTING j ON j.JOB_ID = b.FK_JOB_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_IMAGE_FILE f ON f.FILE_ID = b.IMAGE_FILE_ID WHERE b.FK_MEMBERID = #{memberId} ORDER BY b.BANNER_ID DESC
